prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: JSP-TTX-NEUTKIT-3PC-BUN-AMZ Product Type: ART_AND_CRAFT_SUPPLY Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 3pc Testing Acid Neutralizer Solution Testing Stone Set .5oz Bottles Description: If you need to test metal quality frequently, then you absolutely need a reliable set of acid neutralizers to make sure you’re cleaning your testing equipment in between tests for accurate results. The ToolTreaux acid neutralizer kit comes with 2 bottles of testing acid-neutralizing solutions and a testing stone to remove the residual testing solution from your stone in between metal testing.

Residual testing solutions can affect your test results, so it’s important to clean your testing equipment in between tests. Easy to use, just add the neutralizing solution to your testing stone and wipe it with a clean cloth once finished. Test solutions work best in small quantities, so it’s recommended to use the neutralizing solution in small amounts for each test. Since we’ve included 2 bottles, this amount should last through many tests.

The neutralizing kit with a testing stone is ideal for jewelry makers and sellers, coin collectors and sellers, and metalworking enthusiasts and appraisers alike. Each bottle contains .5 ounces of testing solution and the stone measures 2.25” x 1.75”.

Search Terms: silver gold 10k testing test solution precious metal verify heavy tester coins appraisal fine jewelry gold panning equipment purity test sterling antique decor professional hobbyist silversmith maker jeweler repair appraise tool set Features: - 3PC NEUTRALIZING SET - ToolTreaux testing neutralizer set comes with 2 bottles of testing neutralizing solution and a testing stone; Neutralizer cleans your testing stone of residual testing solution in between metal testing - HOW TO NEUTRALIZE - Residual testing solutions can affect your test results, so it’s important to clean your testing equipment in between tests; Add the neutralizing solution to your stone and wipe with a clean cloth - USE IN SMALL QUANTITIES - Test solutions work best in small quantities, so it’s recommended to use the acid-neutralizing solution in small amounts for each test; 2 included bottles should last for many tests - VERSATILE TESTING KIT - Neutralizing solution set with testing stone is ideal for jewelry makers and sellers, coin collectors and sellers, metalworking enthusiasts, and jewelry appraisers - SPECIFICATIONS - Set size: 3 pieces (2 neutralizing bottles, 1 testing stone); Materials: neutralizer, stone, plastic); Bottle size: 0.5oz each bottle; Stone size: 2.25” x 1.75”; Colors: blue, yellow, black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
